column3: I don't like it when mathematicians who know much more than I do can't express themselves explicitly.

column3: I wish I could care more about my grades but it seems that, at a certain point of my life, I decided they wouldn't be so important anymore.

column3: The mandatory character of schooling is rarely analyzed in the multitude of works dedicated to the study of the various ways to develop within children the desire to learn.

column3: If you don't want to put on sunscreen, that's your problem. Just don't come complaining to me when you get a sunburn.

column3: Mathematics is the part of science you could continue to do if you woke up tomorrow and discovered the universe was gone.

column3: If you're tired, why don't you go to sleep? "Because if I go to sleep now I will wake up too early."

column3: When the body is touched, receptors in the skin send messages to the brain causing the release of chemicals such as endorphins.

column3: The French government has launched an online game that challenges taxpayers to balance the national budget.

column3: Mathematicians are like French people: whatever you tell them they translate it into their own language and turn it into something totally different.

column6: Die Mathematiker sind eine Art Franzosen: redet man zu ihnen, so übersetzen sie es in ihre Sprache, und dann ist es alsobald ganz etwas anders.
